message:
docs(readme): fix df.column(name)? — column returns Option (br-sjeh1 / fd90.169)

fd90.169: line 1528 in Selection and Indexing showed:

  let col = df.column("price")?;             // Single column as &Column

But crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:16242 declares:
  pub fn column(&self, name: &str) -> Option<&Column>

The ? operator on Option only works in functions that return Option
(or a compatible Try-impl). In a typical Result-returning function,
applying ? to an Option hits:
  error[E0277]: the ? operator can only be used on Option in a
  function that returns Option

Fix: use .expect("price column exists") to surface the missing-column
case explicitly so the snippet compiles in any context. Pure README
change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
